journal_entry.description: Client entertainment meal paid by corporate credit card
journal_entry.rationale: Meals and entertainment expense is recognized at full amount ($125). HST of 13% ($16.25) is recoverable as input tax credit. Corporate credit card liability increases by total amount paid ($141.25).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Client entertainment meal paid by corporate credit card. Under IFRS, meals and entertainment are operating expenses. In Canada, only 50% of meals and entertainment expenses are deductible for tax purposes, but the full amount is recorded as an expense for financial reporting. The corporate credit card creates a liability. HST (13% in ON) is recoverable on business meals.
